tweak_hints: A pure sine wave will get you close to this smooth, fundamental-heavy tone.
Low-pass filter around 433Hz gives this muffled character.
Add some filter resonance for that characteristic 'quack'.
Add reverb for the ambient, spacious quality.
Classic Ampeg SVT tone - try driving the preamp for that signature growl.
Heavy compression detected - try a bass compressor with slow attack to preserve transients.
Classic Ampeg SVT tone - try driving the preamp for that signature growl.
Heavy compression detected - try a bass compressor with slow attack to preserve transients.

A pure sine wave will get you close to this smooth, fundamental-heavy tone.
Low-pass filter around 883Hz gives this muffled character.
Add some filter resonance for that characteristic 'quack'.
Slow attack (~93ms) creates the pad-like swell.
LFO at ~0.5Hz modulating amplitude creates the movement.
Add reverb for the ambient, spacious quality.
Fretless character - emphasize mids for that 'mwah' and consider subtle chorus.
